blockingIssues.description: The frontend-refactor milestone still fails its App.jsx size gate. `git show 74c1aef:src/App.jsx | wc -l` returns `400` instead of the required `< 400`, and the current milestone head is already back up to 417 lines, so VAL-FRONTEND-002 will fail its code-review check.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that this repo does not currently have a DOM test stack, so frontend workers should default to store/utils tests with the Node runner plus agent-browser verification unless adding the missing harness is explicitly in scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The frontend-state-management handoff explicitly noted that Testing Library-style component tests were not practical because package.json lacks vitest/jsdom/@testing-library dependencies, and the implementation was verified with Zustand store tests plus agent-browser instead.
